feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Problem: Multiple Freight Settlement creation in SAP TM
entry.content:
For 1 freight order the system creates automatically different freight settlements to different dates automatically and that is not correct.

It should be that for 1 Freight order the system creates only 1 freight settlement document.

The steps are following in the system:

When departed it makes automatic goods issue of the delivery note.

Furthermore 1 Freight settlement is automatically created.

When the GI is registered then 1 correct freight settlement is automatically created (via JOBPLANER)

This example was correct.

But suddenly to a later point for example 03.01.2024 or 28.12.2023 a further freight settlement is automatically created. And that is not correct.

The yellow marked freight settlement documents were created automatically without any change in the system.

Here are some Screenshots:

 

I checked already the customizing and the master data I did not find an issue in these areas.

Is there maybe an SAP Note? Or is it there anything in Coding ABAP?

How is it possible to solve this problem?

Thanks a lot.

entry.title: Advanced intercompany sales (5D2), configure process step order
entry.content:
Hello,

I request support to know if it is possible to change the order of the pre-established steps.

For example I need the IVS intercompany invoice to be generated before the customer invoice-

Another need of the company is to be able to integrate a new step into the monitor value chain where a transfer can be made between plants of the same company to supply the plant that functions as a delivering company in the advanced intercompany model.

Greetings and thanks in advance

entry.title: cds view excluding lines with a selection NOT IN another table
entry.content:
Hi experts.

I'm looking for some help / advices on CDS view SQL syntax (I'm not a developer).

I'm trying to fetch datas from PRPS and PRPHI tables (I'm building a CDS view to populate a composite dimension in SAP Analytics cloud.

I'd like my WBS dimension to have a level property field populated from my CDS view

 

select distinct from prps

inner join prhi on prps.pspnr = prhi.posnr

inner join proj on prps.psphi = proj.pspnr

{ key prps.posid as ID, // prhi.posnr has internal format

prps.postu as DESCRIP,

proj.pspid as PARENT, // link to project

'lvl1' as TYPE }

where prhi.up = '00000000'

above "where" is working fine for isolating lvl1 wbs into a subset of data

How could I process to isolate lvl2 WBSs (second line of the screenshot for example) ?

(then I add it to my result set with a union)

Same for lvl3 WBSs ... the condition would be something like PRPS.PSPNR NOT IN (select distinct from prhi {prhi.up}) but it seem the "IN" keyword is not allowed in "CDS SQL"

How would you proceed ? (hope my need is clear)

Thanks in advance.

G.

entry.title: Billing for 2 types of services with different retention categories for the same client and company
entry.content:
Billing for 2 types of services with different retention categories for the same client and company.

There is a scenario in the service billing process, where the same customer for the same company bills for different services with different retentions.

 

If, during billing for services, retentions (with or without) are not adjusted in the BP, depending on the type of service billed, NFS-e and accounting are impacted.

 

Billing consulting service for BR20 company WITH RETENTION: 

WT agent activated to WTax Code T0, T8, T9, TI

Billing advertising service for BR20 company WITHOUT RETENTION: 

WT agent NOT activated to WTax Code T0, T8, T9, TI

entry.title: Sales order Currency is different from Accounting Document
entry.content:
Hi All:

Issue: in sales order currency is USD( same as Customer) and Invoice currency is changing to CNY( company code).

SO:

After Release to Accounting(VF02), the Amt.in loc.cur. is different。

Accounting Document:

Why the difference 0.01 add to line2?

What is this logic？

Please help me

entry.title: how to transport an ambient ui5 application
entry.content:
hello to all
I have some beginner doubts.
context:
I created a ui5 application in SAP BAS and did the deploy-to-abap to the ERP DEV environment.
Once the deploy is done, I transport the application to QAS.
My doubts are:
Is it ok what I did?
Is it possible to deploy directly to QAS?
When transporting from environments, what should I include in the transport TO?

Also, I must say that when I do this, the application only works in DEV and not in QAS. When I do a "test service" to the application from the trx SICF in DEV, the application opens correctly. But if I do the same in QAS, the application opens a white screen in the browser and says "file not found".

entry.title: Migration of SD - Condition Records for Free Goods
entry.content:
Hi Members, 

I am migrating the condition records for free goods using the SD - Condition Records for Free Goods Migration Object in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition. During the migration, I need to input the condition table number for the condition type YA00 - Free Goods SD. However, I couldn't find the condition table number for the mentioned condition type in the system.

Then, when I simulate the migration project, it says, "For condition type YA00 and table 004, there are no valid access sequences."

I'm trying to find the KB but couldn't find any. Please help me with where I can check the condition table number and access sequence for the condition type YA00 - Free Goods SD.

Thanks.

Kenny

entry.title: Email configuration in S/4Hana Public Cloud for Purchase Order Quotation Email template
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

I have gone through some blogs, but i am unable to find out, what are the steps need to configure to send S/4Hana Purchase Order Quotation email to receiver email.

We have activated DKIM process also which is for S/4Hana Public Cloud.

Kindly requesting our SAP experts to guide us.

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Tolerance check refer to PP （price variance） during invoice verification
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Is there any possibility to check the tolerance of Accumulate Price variance instead of variance of each invoice refer to PP during invoice verification?  for example, we set amount upper threshold is 1000 in OMR6, refer to same PO item, there are two invoices, first invoice exceeds 600, it should be passed without be locked as the tolerance is acceptable, while if the secondary invoice is same, we would like to block the payment as the accumulated tolerance is 1200, over the threshold, so we would like to block the secondary invoice, is it possible? if yes, may we know how? thanks!

PO Line

PO Amount

Invoice Amount

Variance

Current Behavior

Expectation

1

10000

10600

600

Released due to variance is less than 10% and less than 1000 AUD

Released due to variance is less than 10% and less than 1000 AUD

2

10000

10600

600

Released due to variance is less than 10% and less than 1000 AUD

Should block due to variance is greater than 1000 AUD

entry.title: How do we clear the Down Payment without using F-54?
How do I extract data from SAP R/3 (4.7) ?
entry.content:
Hi,

As we are trying to migrate data from SAP R/3 (Version 4.7) to SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public) through staging tables, could you please suggest possible ways to extract data from version 4.7? We need to extract all fields and tables (both specified and unspecified/classified and non-classified) from R/3.

We have attempted to extract data using transaction code SE16N, but we couldn't extract all tables, especially the classified ones. By using transaction code RSO2 for custom data source creation, we managed to extract some data, but not all fields from the tables. Kindly suggest possible ways to achieve complete data extraction, including any other transaction codes that may be useful.

Thank you.

entry.title: /SDF/HDB_SIZING - Result Analysis
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am currently working on a brownfield conversion from ECC (HANA database) to S/4HANA (RISE private cloud) and encountered a significant issue with a report execution. On the same day, the report showed a difference of 50GB between two executions.

Details:

  • The report was executed twice on the same day.
  • In between the executions, table purging was performed, reducing the database size.
  • Despite the purging, the report showed a discrepancy of 50GB.

Has anyone encountered a similar issue during a brownfield conversion, or does anyone have insights into what might be causing this discrepancy? What steps should I take to diagnose and resolve this inconsistency?

Regards

 

Any help or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: S4Hana / Fiori: Staff changes >> Changes to Change Record Processors
entry.content:
What is the most efficient solution to automatically update processors in the Change Record for each task based on staff changes in our organization? If we have staff changes, they are updated in SuccessFactors. Is there an API or something that can manage the updates between SuccessFactors and processors loaded in SAP S/4HANA Change Record?

This seems like a table export/import process from SF to S4Hana somehow, but what is required to enable this solution?

entry.title: Is footer in fiori launchpad below the tiles possible?
entry.content:
Can we add a footer in the Fiori launchpad below the tiles?  I want to show the system name and client ID at the bottom of the Fiori launchpad no matter what page or tiles we have clicked.
We are currently using S/4 Hana Ds4 050

entry.title: BAPI TO CREATE CUSTOMER MATERIAL INFO RECORD CLASSIFICATION (VD51)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I want to create Customer Material Info Record Classification in VD51 with respective customer code and Material Number.

How to create that using BAPI?

What BAPI is available for that? 

Reg, 
Prakash

entry.title: No Backend Services Found API_TASK_SPI_REPLICATION
entry.content:
I am getting this
No Backend Services Found

when trying to add API_TASK_SPI_REPLICATION with tcode /n/IWFND/MAINT_SERVICES to activate in the "Activate and Maintain Services" .

I have tried everything and with all System Alias

Tried this /n/iwbep/reg_service but still cant add this service.
Does it need to be added when the system was provisioned?
Am I missing something?

Thanks for any help.

Ger

entry.title: How do I configure automated financial closing in SAP S/4HANA?
entry.content:
I'm trying to set up automated financial closing in SAP S/4HANA. Could someone guide me through the configuration steps or share any resources that could help?
thanks in advance if anyone can help me with it.........

entry.title: Email Notification template setting in S4HANA
entry.content:
I want to send email notification after Purchase Requisition creation in s4hana.

I copy predelivered email template SWF_CRT_NOTIFIY_RECIPIENTS and create custom template name YY1_02000458_CRT_19.

I want to know which settings are needed to get email notification of this template.

Best Regards,

KhaingZin

entry.title: S4: Customizing not active after import - table buffer issue
entry.content:
There is a problem in transport management on a SAP S/4HANA 2020 landscape hosted on Hyperscaler (private system).

Problem:

  • SAP Transport is released in the dev system, contains customizing of a maintenance view.
  • Transport Is imported in Q or Prod, but the customizing is not active after import.
  • Although the entries are changed in the underlying table (check in SE16H), they still appear unchanged in the view. The system contiues to behave in a way, that new customizing is not active.

The remedy is to manually reset all table buffers (/$SYNC), a system reboot will do the same.

I do not have this issue with other customer so much, so this must be a system setting? Basis Team cannot find the root cause. But we do not have this problem at all/other customers... so there must be some setting in the system?

entry.title: QM Notification Number Range Issue
entry.content:
Hello Team,
I have activated checkbox Early Number Allocation against Notification Type in Configuration.
When I try to create a notification using QM01 but don't save and come back.
Then I try to create the notification again the Notification number series is skipped and taking the next number series.
Why is this behavior so and what can be done to solve the same ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
